name: Air Max Battery with Tester
summary: Offer your customers the power they trust with this official Arizer 26650 replacement battery, made exclusively for the Arizer Air MAX vaporiser.
description: Offer your customers the power they trust with this official Arizer 26650 replacement battery, made exclusively for the Arizer Air MAX vaporiser. Engineered for durability and extended life, this Li-ion battery ensures consistent performance, whether it's a replacement or backup. The included battery tester doubles as a secure case, making it ideal for retail display or bundling with vaporiser kits. Provide your customers with reliable parts backed by Arizer’s reputation for quality. A practical part to keep your device working as it should.
